name: locked_with_positive_base_unchanged
description: Locked AND base_stop_level > 0: floor does NOT change the output (max(positive, 0.0) = positive).
derivation: dynamic_activation = 2.0. threshold = 1.8. current_return (3.0) >= 1.8 -> ticks++ -> 7. Already locked, stays locked. Locked AND base (1.5) > 0 -> stop = max(1.5, 0.0) = 1.5 unchanged. Catches an impl that clamps to 0 regardless of sign (would emit 0.0).
